name: Rosewood Credit Services, LLC
description_short: Rosewood Credit Services is a full-service credit repair company that disputes inaccurate items on credit reports and provides financial coaching to help clients improve their credit scores.
description_long:
Rosewood Credit Services, LLC operates as a credit repair firm specializing in removing derogatory and inaccurate information from clients' credit reports. The company leverages expertise in the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA), Fair Debt Collections Practices Act (FDCPA), and broader consumer protection laws to challenge errors on behalf of its clients. Based on their website presence at rosewoodcredit.com, they position themselves as a "full service credit repair company that uses advanced credit repair techniques."

The company offers multiple service tiers. Their core offerings include a Full Enrollment program ($199 individual, $299 couple) focused on disputing inaccurate information, correcting personal data errors, and removing unverifiable items. They supplement this with ancillary services including Credit Report Audits ($69), which provide phone consultations and analysis with improvement recommendations, and Budget Mastermind Sessions ($89) combining financial analysis with goal-setting assistance. They also offer Individual Credit Coaching and Consultative Services around debt management and financial planning.

Rosewood differentiates itself through personalized service delivery—client testimonials highlight dedicated monitoring and one-on-one consultation. One reviewer noted the company "monitored my credit 24/7," while another praised an "over an hour" comprehensive credit report deep dive. Their named staff member Shermika appears prominently in testimonials, suggesting a relationship-based service model rather than purely automated processing.

However, prospective clients should note that credit repair outcomes are never guaranteed. While testimonials report score improvements (one couple reached the 700s after 7 months), individual results vary. The company's pricing is moderate compared to some competitors, but clients should understand that disputing errors is a service available to consumers for free through the credit bureaus directly. The value proposition centers on professional handling and expertise interpretation of consumer protection law rather than access to exclusive dispute mechanisms.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers tiered pricing with affordable entry point ($69 for credit report audit alone)
Emphasizes expertise in FCRA and consumer protection law to support dispute strategy
Provides personalized one-on-one coaching and consultations rather than automated-only service
Includes budget and financial goal-setting services alongside credit repair
Includes escalation services using consumer protection laws if initial disputes aren't resolved
Multiple positive client testimonials reporting tangible score improvements (mentions of 700+ scores achieved)
Corrects inaccurate personal information (name, address, SSN, employer) in addition to negative items
cons: Credit repair services are duplicative of free dispute rights consumers already have directly with bureaus and creditors
No specific timeline provided for dispute resolution or score improvement—results presented as highly variable
Limited transparency on company background, founding date, or years in operation on available website content
Testimonials lack detail on actual items disputed or specific reasons for score improvements
No mention of money-back guarantees, performance metrics, or outcome statistics
best_for: Consumers with confirmed inaccurate or unverifiable items on credit reports who prefer professional dispute management
Individuals seeking comprehensive financial guidance alongside credit repair (budget and goal-setting needs)
People unfamiliar with the dispute process who want personalized coaching and interpretation of credit reports
Couples or co-filers seeking joint credit repair and financial planning services
diagnosis: Rosewood Credit Services is best for consumers seeking professional guidance through the credit dispute process, particularly those wanting personalized coaching and integrated financial planning. The main caveat is that while their expertise and personalized service may add value, the core dispute mechanism (challenging inaccuracies with bureaus) is a free right available directly to all consumers—clients are paying for professional intermediation and interpretation rather than unique access.
services: Full Enrollment Credit Repair (individual and couple plans)
Investigation and identification of inaccuracies on credit reports
Custom dispute letter creation and delivery to credit bureaus and creditors
Dispute escalation using consumer protection laws (FCRA, FDCPA)
Credit Report Audit with phone consultation and recommendations
Budget Mastermind Sessions with activity-based income/expenditure analysis
Consultative Services for budgeting and debt management
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
